title: nautilocalyx hirtiflorus
intro: Nautilocalyx hirtiflorus is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the hairy-flowered nautilocalyx. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Nautilocalyx hirtiflorus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Nautilocalyx hirtiflorus can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, but more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
